note: Trimmed menu placards response (GET www-api.panerabread.com/www-api/public/menu/placards/{cafeId}/version/{mnavPlacard}/{mnavPlacardSchedule}/en-US?cloud=false). Cafe 606477 (Chicago) captured live 2026-07-08 via versions from /public/menu/versions/{cafeId}. Items live in an OBJECT keyed by plcId (not an array) at .placards. Multiple items can share the same display name ("Broccoli Cheddar Soup" appears for cup/bowl/bread-bowl sizes) so the parser must also match imgKey to pick the bowl size ("broccoli-cheddar-soup-bowl", not -cup/-breadbowl/-group). Confirmed per-cafe price variance (Chicago cafe 606477 bowl=8.99 vs LA cafe 606381 bowl=9.59 on 2026-07-08).
